name: psep
description: Practical Software Engineering Principles for Claude Code. A controlled reasoning system for architecture, design, and code review. Never active during implementation — only when you need architectural judgment.

plugins.name: psep
plugins.description: 7 principles for architecture, design, and code review. /psep strict for full principles + decision framework, /psep relaxed for 7-question binary checklist. Stateless, scoped to design/review/refactor/architecture only.
